_doc: Deployment-address registry for Carbon DEX. Copy to addresses.json (gitignored) when you do a real deploy. anvil-local section is the deterministic CREATE chain that Deploy.s.sol produces against anvil's default funded key (account 0); Sepolia and mainnet sections are populated post-broadcast. ENS naming is a subdomain scheme: regulator owns verified-entity.eth, issues subdomains to verified companies. Pattern adapted from Parth's earlier addresses.json (2e36c93).

ens._naming: Subdomain scheme: 'verified-entity.eth' is owned by the regulator and acts as the institutional namespace. Each verified company gets a subdomain on registration. The regulator itself uses the bare 'eu-ets-authority.eth'. This makes the institutional structure on-chain visible — judges + auditors can see at a glance which addresses are verified entities just from the ENS name.
